COMMENT: The accompanying FDB code for this description appears in the dosage form code variable (called 
GCDF). 

In the formulary file, this variable is populated by matching the drug products on the Part D Plan 
submitted formulary to FDB. Part D plan sponsors submit the formulary to the CMS Health Plan 
Management System (HPMS). Plans identify the drug products on their formularies using the National 
Library of Medicine RxNorm Concept Unique Identifiers (RXCUIs). Each RXCUI
